description: Bifolio from an account book. In Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script. Dating: 11th or 12th century. Many entries boxed and/or crossed out. The sums are fairly high (e.g. 44 dinars in one line). Mentions names such as Mūsā; Abū Sahl Menashshe; Abū l-Ḥasan; Abū Naṣr al-Ṭaḥḥān; Abū Zikrī; Ḥusayn; and Ḥasan. T-S AS 201.82, T-S NS 83.18, and T-S NS 320.125 probably all come from the same ledger. ASE
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
